title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Maruti Suzuki India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Maruti Suzuki India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Maruti Suzuki India in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Maruti Suzuki India:
Maruti Suzuki India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maruti Suzuki India!
